delphine nyaboke

Machine Learning & Software Engineer

Building responsible, inclusive AI for low-resource contexts

Learn more Get in touch

About Me

Machine Learning and Software Engineer with 5+ years of experience in designing, developing, and deploying AI/ML solutions, including LLM-based systems for data classification and automation in fintech and government applications.

Skilled in leading AI tool integration for evidence search/retrieval, synthesis workflows, and policy-facing platforms in low-resource African settings, translating business problems into scalable use cases like multilingual conversational AI serving 50M+ users, using Agile and cross-functional collaboration.

Proficient in prototyping, training, validating, and optimizing AI/ML models (e.g., deep learning, NLP, generative AI) with frameworks like PyTorch, Rasa, and OpenAI, while ensuring ethical AI principles, data privacy, and model governance through documentation, testing, and integration into production environments on cloud platforms (Azure, AWS, GCP).

Excel in ambiguous, distributed teams, calm in chaos; driving process improvements, data analysis, and scalable deployments to meet targets, with a commitment to inclusive, unbiased AI for sustainable development in multicultural contexts, with a focus on bias mitigation and ethical AI governance in low-resource African contexts.

Experience

AI & Machine Learning Specialist

International Centre for Evaluation and Development (ICED)

February 2026 – April 2026

Led the design and integration of AI-enabled tools to support evidence synthesis, systematic reviews, and policy decision-making.

  • Built production-grade conversational RAG chatbot (LangGraph + Streamlit) for policy outputs from 500+ PDF collections
  • Developed Flask file download API with SHA-256 integrity verification and secure streaming
  • Created Django-based finance automation system integrated with Microsoft Graph API and Azure AD
  • Designed RIS-to-PDF conversion pipelines with integrity checks

Machine Learning Intern

International Labour Organization (ILO)

June 2025 – December 2025

Developed and deployed an LLM-powered document classification and ranking tool that reduced processing time from 3 days to under 5 minutes.

  • Built production LLM document classification system with human-in-the-loop validation
  • Implemented CI/CD pipelines and ontology-based quality checks
  • Tool remains actively used by the ILO Library
  • Contributed to Swahili component of Global PIQA benchmark (arXiv:2511.03464)

Software Engineer

THiNK

2023 – 2025

Built multilingual conversational AI systems and automation tools for government and fintech platforms serving millions of users.

  • Developed Rasa + Django multilingual chatbot integrated with Kenyan government platforms (eCitizen, etc.)
  • Reduced operational costs by ~50% through LLM automation for bank/fintech processes
  • Improved technical documentation coverage from 10% to 90%

Software Engineer

Sendy

2021 – 2023

Contributed to logistics and payments infrastructure across five African countries.

  • Worked on tracking systems, M-Pesa integrations, and algorithm optimization
  • Supported compliance and process improvements across multiple markets

Featured Projects

Global PIQA (Swahili Component)

Contributed to the Swahili portion of the Global PIQA benchmark for physical commonsense reasoning in low-resource languages.

Enhancing Modified VGG16 for Monkeypox Detection

Improved model for monkeypox detection using modified VGG16 and explored architectures like ConvNext for enhanced accuracy in data processing

Forecasting Electoral Violence by Leveraging Conflict Datasets

Integrated datasets for ML-based forecasting, involving data processing and analysis at election-year-country level.

Data Analysis Machine Learning Forecasting

AI-Powered Question Answering for Low-Resourced Schools

Developed conversational chatbot using Rasa, OpenAI, and LLMs for educational information management.

Rasa OpenAI LLMs

LLM-Powered Hospital Navigation System

Collaborated on LLM system to streamline patient appointment booking, focusing on data processing and integration.

LLMs Chainlit Data Processing Healthcare

Leveraging LLMs for Low-Resourced Languages

Built interface for science education in Kinyarwanda using LLMs, supporting information management in low-resource settings.
